name: Magistus Invocation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖なる法典</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マギストス・インヴォケーション</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material, including a Spellcaster monster. If Summoning a "Magistus" Fusion Monster this way, you can also use monsters in your Spell & Trap Zones that are equipped to a "Magistus" monster. You can only activate 1 "Magistus Invocation" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as material, including a Spellcaster monster. If Summoning a "Magistus" Fusion Monster this way, you can also use monsters in your Spell & Trap Zones that are equipped to a "Magistus" monster. You can only activate 1 "Magistus Invocation" per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses Spell Cards as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
